name: august-investment-brain
description: August's authenticated shared investment memory and analyst workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Query August memory and work in its investment standard.
interface.longDescription: Authenticated access to August company and organizational memory, source traces, investment workflows, and a private per-user investment profile.
defaultPrompt: What is August's current read on this company?
What changed across the portfolio this week?
Onboard me into the Investment Brain.
